description: Test vectors for LICHEN LoRa propagation model (path loss, received power, SNR, max range, link budget, and SINR). Computed from log-distance path loss formula PL(d) = PLâ + 10*n*logââ(d/dâ) at 915 MHz with PLâ=32.44 dB, dâ=1m. Independent oracle: values verified against hand calculation and Semtech SX1262 sensitivity figures per AN1200.64. Shadowing and fading are stochastic and cannot have deterministic vectors; their variance and distribution properties are verified by unit tests.

vectors.name: path_loss_1m_free_space
vectors.description: Path loss at 1m reference distance (free space n=2.0). PL = 32.44 + 0 = 32.44 dB

vectors.name: path_loss_10m_free_space
vectors.description: Path loss at 10m (free space n=2.0). PL = 32.44 + 20*log10(10) = 32.44 + 20 = 52.44 dB

vectors.name: received_power_1m_14dbm
vectors.description: Received power at 1m with +14 dBm TX. RX = 14 - 32.44 = -18.44 dBm

vectors.name: received_power_100m_14dbm
vectors.description: Received power at 100m with +14 dBm TX (urban). RX = 14 - 86.44 = -72.44 dBm

vectors.name: snr_100m_noise_minus120
vectors.description: SNR at 100m with noise floor -120 dBm. SNR = -72.44 - (-120) = 47.56 dB

vectors.name: max_range_sf10_14dbm_urban
vectors.description: Max range for SF10 sensitivity (-132 dBm) with 14 dBm TX, urban n=2.7. Range = 10^((14 + 132 - 32.44)/27) * 1 = 10^4.205... ~ 16032 m

vectors.name: link_budget_1km_urban
vectors.description: Full link budget at 1km: TX=14 dBm, ant gain 2 dBi each, cable loss 1 dB. Path loss at 1km urban = 32.44 + 27*log10(1000) = 113.44 dB. RX = 14 + 2 - 1 - 113.44 + 2 = -96.44 dBm. Margin = -96.44 - (-132) = 35.56 dB. SNR = -96.44 - (-120) = 23.56 dB

vectors.name: sinr_two_equal_signals
vectors.description: SINR with two equal-strength signals at -72.44 dBm each, noise floor -120 dBm. S_lin = 10^(-7.244) = 5.70e-8 mW. I_lin = 5.70e-8 mW. N_lin = 10^(-12) = 1e-12 mW. SINR = 10*log10(5.70e-8 / (1e-12 + 5.70e-8)) = 10*log10(0.9828) ~ -0.076 dB

vectors.name: sinr_strong_dominant
vectors.description: SINR with strong signal -60 dBm and weak interferer -90 dBm, noise -120 dBm. S_lin = 1e-6, I_lin = 1e-9, N_lin = 1e-12. SINR = 10*log10(1e-6 / (1e-12 + 1e-9)) = 10*log10(999.0) ~ 29.996 dB
